tool.name: OGS: TecPlotTools
tool.description: Galaxy wrapper for the OGS utility 'TecPlotTools'.
tool.command: mkdir inputs; # Verzeichnis für saubere Trennung #for $m in $input_file: ln -s "$m" "inputs/${m.element_identifier}"; #end for tecplottools $split $convert #for $m in $input_file: --input-file "inputs/${m.element_identifier}" #end for --output-file output_1.vtu

param.name: split
param.label: split
param.help: split time steps into separate files

param.name: convert
param.label: convert
param.help: convert TecPlot data into OGS meshes

tool.help: This tool runs the **TecPlotTools** utility from the OpenGeoSys suite.
